glosses.ja: 世話をする; 手入れする

sentences.target: Wir pflegen jeden Sonntag den kleinen Garten.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈpfleːɡən ˈjeːdən ˈzɔntaːk deːn ˈklaɪ̯nən ˈɡaʁtən./

translations.de: Wir pflegen jeden Sonntag den kleinen Garten.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈpfleːɡən ˈjeːdən ˈzɔntaːk deːn ˈklaɪ̯nən ˈɡaʁtən./
translations.en: We tend the small garden every Sunday.
translations.es: Cuidamos el pequeño jardín todos los domingos.
translations.fr: Nous entretenons le petit jardin tous les dimanches.
translations.it: Curiamo il piccolo giardino ogni domenica.
translations.ko: 우리는 매주 일요일에 작은 정원을 가꿔요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们每个星期天都打理小花园。
translations.yue: 我哋每個星期日都打理個小花園。
translations.ru: Мы ухаживаем за маленьким садом по воскресеньям.
translations.pt: Cuidamos do pequeno jardim todos os domingos.
translations.he: אנחנו מטפחים את הגינה הקטנה בכל יום ראשון.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi chăm sóc khu vườn nhỏ vào mỗi Chủ nhật.
translations.ar: نعتني بالحديقة الصغيرة كل يوم أحد.
translations.nl: We onderhouden de kleine tuin elke zondag.
translations.uk: Ми доглядаємо за маленьким садом щонеділі.
translations.hu: Minden vasárnap gondozzuk a kis kertet.
translations.hi: हम हर रविवार छोटे बगीचे की देखभाल करते हैं.
translations.el: Φροντίζουμε τον μικρό κήπο κάθε Κυριακή.
translations.nb: Vi steller den lille hagen hver søndag.
translations.id: Kami merawat kebun kecil setiap hari Minggu.
translations.sv: Vi sköter den lilla trädgården varje söndag.
translations.ro: Îngrijim grădina mică în fiecare duminică.
translations.cs: Každou neděli se staráme o malou zahradu.
translations.da: Vi passer den lille have hver søndag.
translations.ja: 私たちは毎週日曜日に小さな庭の手入れをします。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the finite verb 'pflegen'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural agreeing with 'Wir'; transitive and takes an accusative object; also co-occurs with a temporal accusative phrase.
Indefinite quantifier, masculine accusative singular; determiner of 'Sonntag' forming a temporal accusative NP ('every Sunday').
Noun, masculine accusative singular; head of the accusative time expression modified by 'jeden'.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of 'Garten'.
Attributive adjective with weak inflection (-en) after definite article; accusative masculine singular; modifies 'Garten'.
Noun, masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'pflegen'.

sentences.target: Ich muss meinen kranken Kater pflegen.

translations.de: Ich muss meinen kranken Kater pflegen.
translations.en: I have to care for my sick cat.
translations.es: Tengo que cuidar a mi gato enfermo.
translations.fr: Je dois m'occuper de mon chat malade.
translations.it: Devo prendermi cura del mio gatto malato.
translations.yue: 我要照顧我隻病咗嘅貓。
translations.ru: Мне нужно ухаживать за моим больным котом.
translations.pt: Eu tenho que cuidar do meu gato doente.
translations.he: אני צריך לטפל בחתול שלי החולה.
translations.vi: Tôi phải chăm sóc con mèo bị bệnh của tôi.
translations.nl: Ik moet voor mijn zieke kat zorgen.
translations.uk: Я маю доглядати за своїм хворим котом.
translations.hi: मुझे अपनी बीमार बिल्ली की देखभाल करनी है.
translations.pl: Muszę opiekować się moim chorym kotem.
translations.el: Πρέπει να φροντίσω την άρρωστη γάτα μου.
translations.nb: Jeg må ta vare på den syke katten min.
translations.id: Saya harus merawat kucing saya yang sakit.
translations.sv: Jag måste ta hand om min sjuka katt.
translations.ro: Trebuie să am grijă de pisica mea bolnavă.
translations.cs: Musím se starat o svého nemocného kocoura.
translations.da: Jeg skal passe min syge kat.
translations.ja: 病気の猫の世話をしなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the modal auxiliary 'muss'.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects the infinitive 'pflegen' to form a verbal complex.
Possessive determiner, masculine accusative singular; determiner of 'Kater' marking the possessor (speaker).
Attributive adjective with mixed inflection (-en) after possessive determiner; masculine accusative singular; modifies 'Kater'.
Noun, masculine accusative singular; direct object of the lexical verb 'pflegen' within the modal construction.
Infinitive lexical verb selected by the modal 'muss'; expresses the main action.

sentences.target: Sie pflegen die alten Möbel im Wohnzimmer.
sentences.reading: /ziː ˈpfleːɡən diː ˈaltən ˈmøːbəl ɪm ˈvoːnˌt͡sɪmɐ./

translations.de: Sie pflegen die alten Möbel im Wohnzimmer.
translations.ipa: /ziː ˈpfleːɡən diː ˈaltən ˈmøːbəl ɪm ˈvoːnˌt͡sɪmɐ./
translations.en: They maintain the old furniture in the living room.
translations.es: Cuidan los muebles antiguos del salón.
translations.fr: Ils entretiennent les vieux meubles du salon.
translations.it: Si prendono cura dei vecchi mobili in salotto.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们保养客厅里的旧家具。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺客廳入面保養舊傢俬。
translations.ru: Они ухаживают за старой мебелью в гостиной.
translations.pt: Eles cuidam dos móveis antigos da sala de estar.
translations.he: הם מתחזקים את הרהיטים הישנים בסלון.
translations.tr: Oturma odasındaki eski mobilyaların bakımını yapıyorlar.
translations.vi: Họ bảo dưỡng đồ nội thất cũ trong phòng khách.
translations.ar: هم يعتنون بالأثاث القديم في غرفة المعيشة.
translations.nl: Ze onderhouden de oude meubels in de woonkamer.
translations.uk: Вони доглядають за старими меблями у вітальні.
translations.hu: A nappaliban karbantartják a régi bútorokat.
translations.hi: वे बैठक के पुराने फर्नीचर की देखभाल करते हैं.
translations.pl: Oni dbają o stare meble w salonie.
translations.el: Φροντίζουν τα παλιά έπιπλα στο σαλόνι.
translations.nb: De vedlikeholder de gamle møblene i stuen.
translations.id: Mereka merawat perabotan tua di ruang tamu.
translations.sv: De sköter de gamla möblerna i vardagsrummet.
translations.ro: Ei întrețin mobilierul vechi din sufragerie.
translations.cs: Starají se o starý nábytek v obývacím pokoji.
translations.da: De vedligeholder de gamle møbler i stuen.
translations.ja: 彼らはリビングの古い家具を手入れします。

tokens.explanation: Pronoun in nominative; ambiguous between 3rd person plural ('they') and formal 2nd person ('you'); subject of 'pflegen'.
Finite main verb, present; agrees with 'Sie' (3rd plural or 2nd formal); transitive, taking an accusative object.
Definite article, plural (nominative/accusative form); here accusative; determiner of 'Möbel'.
Attributive adjective with weak inflection (-en) after definite article; plural accusative; modifies 'Möbel'.
Noun, plural accusative; direct object of 'pflegen'.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing the dative; introduces a locative PP.
Noun, neuter dative singular; object of the preposition 'im'; indicates location.

sentences.target: Meine Eltern pflegen Oma zu Hause.

translations.de: Meine Eltern pflegen Oma zu Hause.
translations.en: My parents care for Grandma at home.
translations.es: Mis padres cuidan a la abuela en casa.
translations.fr: Mes parents s'occupent de ma grand-mère à la maison.
translations.it: I miei genitori si prendono cura di mia nonna a casa.
translations.yue: 我父母喺屋企照顧阿嫲。
translations.ru: Мои родители ухаживают за бабушкой дома.
translations.pt: Meus pais cuidam da minha avó em casa.
translations.tr: Annem ve babam büyükanneme evde bakıyor.
translations.vi: Bố mẹ tôi chăm sóc bà ở nhà.
translations.nl: Mijn ouders zorgen thuis voor mijn oma.
translations.uk: Мої батьки доглядають за бабусею вдома.
translations.hu: A szüleim otthon gondozzák a nagymamámat.
translations.hi: मेरे माता-पिता घर पर दादी की देखभाल करते हैं.
translations.pl: Moi rodzice opiekują się babcią w domu.
translations.el: Οι γονείς μου φροντίζουν τη γιαγιά στο σπίτι.
translations.nb: Mine foreldre tar vare på bestemoren min hjemme.
translations.id: Orang tua saya merawat nenek saya di rumah.
translations.sv: Mina föräldrar tar hand om min mormor hemma.
translations.ro: Părinții mei au grijă de bunica acasă.
translations.cs: Moji rodiče se starají o babičku doma.
translations.da: Mine forældre tager sig af bedstemor derhjemme.
translations.ja: 両親は家で祖母の世話をしています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, plural nominative; determiner of 'Eltern'.
Noun, plural nominative; subject of 'pflegen'.
Finite main verb, present, 3rd person plural agreeing with 'Eltern'; transitive.
Noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'pflegen'; kin term used without article.
Preposition governing the dative; in the fixed expression 'zu Hause' meaning 'at home'.
Noun, neuter dative singular; object of 'zu'; fossilized dative in the set phrase 'zu Hause' (locative adverbial PP).

es: Cuidamos el pequeño jardín todos los domingos.
Tengo que cuidar a mi gato enfermo.
Cuidan los muebles antiguos del salón.
Mis padres cuidan a la abuela en casa.

Je dois m'occuper de mon chat malade.
Ils entretiennent les vieux meubles du salon.
Mes parents s'occupent de ma grand-mère à la maison.

Devo prendermi cura del mio gatto malato.

Eu tenho que cuidar do meu gato doente.

Meus pais cuidam da minha avó em casa.

אני צריך לטפל בחתול שלי החולה.

Annem ve babam büyükanneme evde bakıyor.

Ei întrețin mobilierul vechi din sufragerie.

ja: 私たちは毎週日曜日に小さな庭の手入れをします。
病気の猫の世話をしなければなりません。
